text: Being here, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The space is clearly in transition, as if on the edge of becoming—under construction, in the process of assembly or reimagining. The conversations are casual but tinged with the presence of new ideas. I feel like an observer at the threshold of innovation, surrounded by the artifacts and tools of creation. The colors and shapes, the references to research and development, make me reflect on the continuous unfolding of knowledge and the beauty of things being made possible.
